name: Sensing meditation micro check-ins
hypothesis: 2-3 daily pauses (5-10 min) focused on internal state awareness will catch cravings and autopilot before they fire — reducing relapse cascades

name: No poker for 1 week
hypothesis: Removing poker eliminates the domino that wrecks sleep and cascades into clarity relapses and skipped gym

name: Urge awareness pause
hypothesis: When thought of league/porn/poker comes up pause and identify what influences the thought before acting — builds pattern recognition
